script.openingLine: Relive France against Sweden in the round of 32 at New York/New Jersey Stadium.

moments.spokenLine: France meet Sweden in the round of 32 at New York/New Jersey Stadium.
moments.explainer: The replay begins with France and Sweden at the round-of-32 stage.

moments.spokenLine: Kylian MBAPPE scores for France, and the score moves to 1–0.
moments.explainer: France take the lead, changing the score from level to 1–0.

moments.spokenLine: France lead Sweden 1–0 at the interval.
moments.explainer: The half closes with France holding a one-goal advantage.

moments.spokenLine: Bradley BARCOLA scores for France, and the score moves to 2–0.
moments.explainer: France extend their lead to two goals.

moments.spokenLine: Kylian MBAPPE scores again for France, and the score moves to 3–0.
moments.explainer: France add a third goal, moving three goals clear of Sweden.
The completed match ends with France three goals ahead of Sweden.

chapters.text: At kick-off, France meet Sweden in the round of 32 at New York/New Jersey Stadium.
In the 45th minute, Kylian MBAPPE scores for France, and the score moves to 1–0.
In the 53rd minute, Bradley BARCOLA scores for France, and the score moves to 2–0.
In the 74th minute, Kylian MBAPPE scores again for France, and the score moves to 3–0.
